hook.text: MAN UTD MAKE U-TURN ON RASHFORD EXIT

beats.text: CARRICK IS SAID TO WANT TO WORK WITH RASHFORD
INEOS NOW HAVE AN IDEA TO KEEP RASHFORD AT OLD TRAFFORD
RASHFORD WANTS TO STAY IF BARCELONA DO NOT RETURN

caption: Complete U-turn at Old Trafford 🔴 Just 24 hours after United were inviting agents to sell Marcus Rashford, the picture has completely changed — Christian Falk reports that INEOS now have an idea to keep the England winger, and Michael Carrick is said to want to work with the 28-year-old next season. Rashford himself also prefers to stay at Old Trafford if Barcelona don't reignite their interest. Should United give Rashford one more chance? 👇 REPORTED — per Christian Falk / TEAMtalk. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow #rashford
